title: Opulent
body:
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/687/166/opulence-logo.png)
Opulence
-
Adds Over 50 vanilla-styled blocks to decorate your world, with more in active development! Join the discord server to follow development updates.


🢂 Furniture like chairs, tables and statues!

🢂 Building blocks like porcelain bricks, with stairs, slabs and walls to match!

🢂 11 new paintings!


See gallery for screenshots.


💡 Info & Help
-
🢂 Ask for help, give suggestions and report bugs in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/EC5j5Z9bFW)

🖼️ Gallery
-
